testFuzz_exactOut_chargesEnoughForKPrese.details: For x*y=k: if user wants dy out, they must provide dx such that (x+dx)*(y-dy) >= x*y      This means dx >= (x*dy) / (y-dy), with ceil rounding to ensure >=.

testFuzz_productNeverDecreases(uint256,u.details: This is the fundamental AMM property: k = x * y should not decrease

testFuzz_roundTrip_losesValue(uint256,ui.details: This demonstrates pool-favorable rounding - arbitrageurs cannot profit from rounding

test_computeBalance_roundsUp_poolFavorab.details: newBalance = newInvariant^2 / otherBalance, should round UP

test_exactOut_ceilRounding_addsOneWhenRe.details: When (X * dy) % (Y - dy) != 0, ceil division should add 1 to floor result.

test_exactOut_extremeImbalance_invariant.details: Tests 1000:1 pool ratio to ensure rounding holds.

test_exactOut_minimumAmounts_invariantPr.details: Tests smallest amounts that produce non-zero results.

test_exactOut_noCeilPenalty_whenExactlyD.details: When (X * dy) % (Y - dy) == 0, ceil and floor should be equal.

test_exactOut_smallInputSpace_noUndercha.details: Iterates over values [1..100] for balance offsets and amountOut      to find any case where floor division would under-charge amountIn.      This targeted search complements the broader fuzz tests.

test_onSwap_exactOut_roundsUp_poolFavora.details: For EXACT_OUT: dx = (X * dy) / (Y - dy), should round UP

testFuzz_computeBalance_roundsUp(uint256.notice: Fuzz test that computeBalance always rounds UP or equals raw division

testFuzz_exactOut_chargesEnoughForKPrese.notice: Property: EXACT_OUT should charge at least as much as required for k preservation.

testFuzz_onSwap_exactOut_invariantIncrea.notice: Verify that EXACT_OUT rounding protects the pool by ensuring         invariant increases after the swap

testFuzz_onSwap_exactOut_roundsUp(uint25.notice: Fuzz test that EXACT_OUT always rounds UP or equals raw division

testFuzz_productNeverDecreases(uint256,u.notice: Property: Product of balances should increase or stay same after swap

testFuzz_roundTrip_losesValue(uint256,ui.notice: Property: Swapping and swapping back should lose value (due to rounding)

testFuzz_swap_invariantPreserved_exactOu.notice: Fuzz test: EXACT_OUT invariant (k) must never decrease.

test_computeBalance_roundsUp_poolFavorab.notice: Verify computeBalance rounds UP (user provides more tokens)

test_exactOut_ceilRounding_addsOneWhenRe.notice: Verify EXACT_OUT ceil rounding by checking remainder behavior.

test_exactOut_extremeImbalance_invariant.notice: Verify EXACT_OUT protects pool even with extreme imbalance.

test_exactOut_minimumAmounts_invariantPr.notice: Verify EXACT_OUT protects pool with minimum meaningful amounts.

test_exactOut_noCeilPenalty_whenExactlyD.notice: Verify EXACT_OUT equals floor division when evenly divisible.

test_exactOut_smallInputSpace_noUndercha.notice: Search small input space for EXACT_OUT rounding edge cases.

test_onSwap_exactOut_roundsUp_poolFavora.notice: Verify EXACT_OUT rounds UP (user provides more tokens)
